title: Renovations for the new Masjid
customText:
We hit our target and secured the new masjid!
Allahu Akbar! By Allahs ultimate mercy and then your incredible generosity, trust, and duas, we have reached our $1.6 million Phase 1 target and secured the building, Alhamdulillah! 
Phase 2: We are now launching Phase 2: A $400,000 Renovation Fund. Every dollar raised  will go directly toward renovating and beautifying our new 11,400 sq ft home, ensuring the space is stunning and completely ready for worship when our community walks through the doors, InshaAllah.
